text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Okay, that's the final delivery! And my time's a
new personal best!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Now I've just got to call my manager and ask for
next week off...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...Maybe I should invite Trainer, too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bright and early one morning, Ines Fujin comes
running into my office completely out of breath.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hello-lo, Trainer! I've got an invitation for you!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Are you free this weekend? Let's go to Kyoto
together!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin goes on to explain her plan to me. It
turns out her real objective is...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Ta-dah! The spring Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I heard Ryan and McQueen are running, so this is
our chance to check out their current condition!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Exactly! I'm a front runner, right? That means I
hardly get any opportunities to get a good look
at those two closing in from behind.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
And the best place to scope them out while
they're doing that is gonna be the stands, right?
Plus...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
McQueen! Ryan! Show the world just how
incredible the Mejiro family is!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Wow. All they did was come out of the tunnel,
and the audience is going wild...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Ryan and McQueen...

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Eeeek! You're both truly wonderful! I do hope
you'll do your very best to claim victory!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I can see the sparkle in their fans' eyes from here.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
So Ryan and McQueen get showered with all this
attention every time they race...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Moments later, the starting gates burst open and
the spring Tenno Sho begins.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen is in the lead! It's Mejiro
McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Does Mejiro Ryan have what it takes to nab
second place?! McQueen is still in the lead!
Aaand just like that, she crosses the finish line!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...She's strong.

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
That's McQueen for you! She took all that
pressure in stride and realized the Mejiro family's
ambitions!

text_block_list.name: Spectator D
text_block_list.text:
But I can't believe Ryan came fourth... She didn't
even break the top three...

text_block_list.name: Spectator D
text_block_list.text:
I suppose this means McQueen's going to be the
one to guide the Mejiro family forward...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: ...I have something to say!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I may have lost today, but next time, the glory's
mine!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
McQueen isn't the only runner in the Mejiro
family! And at the Takarazuka Kinen, I, Mejiro
Ryan, will show you that I'm not to be ignored!

text_block_list.name: Spectator D
text_block_list.text:
...Yeah! That's right! I'll always be rooting for you,
Ryan!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Ryan...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(I don't know if I could've said something like that
after finishing in fourth...)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
(...Yeah, there's no way. I wouldn't be able to
hide my disappointment. That's the difference
between Ryan and me.)

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...Those are the words of someone who's lived
shouldering expectations.
choice_data_list: Did you learn anything about your opponents?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, totally! This trip to Kyoto was really worth
it!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Now I know exactly what I'll be up against in the
Takarazuka Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin sears the image of her
friends-slash-rivals into her mind.
